seoTitle: North Bodallin vs North Burngup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Bodallin and North Burngup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Bodallin vs North Burngup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Bodallin and North Burngup.
heading: North Bodallin vs North Burngup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Bodallin, Western Australia and North Burngup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Bodallin has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to North Burngup (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Bodallin or North Burngup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Bodallin has a flood risk score of 33/100, while North Burngup scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Bodallin scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. North Burngup scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Bodallin or North Burngup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Bodallin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
